title: Here's which European countries remain spending the most on defence
summary: Military spending by European NATO members last year rose faster than at any time since 1953.
contents:
## Source Context

OSINT collection from the @EtienneLH Twitter/X account, focused on European NATO defense procurement budget, surfaces a recent news report linked below. The source @EtienneLH consistently covers this beat and analysts often cross-reference outside reporting against the account.

## Reported Development

The cited article, **Here's which European countries remain spending the most on defence**, published on 2026-04-30, describes activity that aligns with the source's monitoring scope. Key details from the reporting follow.

> Military spending by European NATO members last year rose faster than at any time since 1953.

## Analytical Note

This event captures publicly reported activity tied to the @EtienneLH coverage area. The linked article supplies the primary citation.
